2372200.name: Yukimura
2372200.description:
Yukimura

Buried in snow. Haunted by whispers. Forgotten by time.

Trapped in a remote mountain village, you must survive the long nights as ancient spirits stir beneath the snow. By day, you gather supplies and decipher a mysterious journal. By night, you hide, perform rituals, and try to stay alive.

Inspired by traditional Japanese folklore and gassho-zukuri architecture, Yukimura blends atmospheric horror with survival and mystery.

Key Features:

  • Explore a handcrafted snow-covered village inspired by Shirakawa-go.

  • Uncover hidden folklore through artifacts, rituals, and journal entries.

  • Manage warmth, light, and time — each decision can mean survival or death.

  • Face supernatural threats that evolve with each passing night.

Immerse yourself in a chilling world of isolation, memory, and myth.
